subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Abha Beauty! The news of the calamity that befell thy kind father hath stirred the ocean of sorrows and caused the utmost grief [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده جمال ابهی خبر مصیبت پدر مهربان سبب هیجان دریای احزان گشت و نهایت تاثر
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @acquiescence and resignation; contentment, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @soul; spirit after death
